title: March 3
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 3''' is the 62nd day of the year (63rd in leap years). There are 303 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Claudio Castellini]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Skottie Young]] is born.
*[[2004]] – [[Empire 17|''Empire'' 17]] published.
*2004 – [[Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi 3|''Star Wars Infinities: Return of the Jedi'' 3]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Kinema Citrus Co.]] founded.
*[[2011]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Secret Missions 3: Duel at Shattered Rock]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – [[Ralph McQuarrie]] dies.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Heir to the Jedi]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Servants of the Empire: Rebel in the Ranks]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Tony Dyson]] dies.
*[[2017]] – The [[Star Wars Rebels Season Four|fourth season]] of ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'' is officially announced.
*2017 – [[Wikipedia:Nintendo Switch|Nintendo Switch]] is launched.
*[[2019]] – "[[Descent (episode)|Descent]]" airs on [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[Star Wars: Be More Box Set]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[The High Republic Adventures (2021) 2|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2021) 2]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic (2021) 3|''The High Republic'' (2021) 3]] published.
